Donkey
Unstoppable Destroyer Mace

When attacking, has a [30%-33%] chance of stunning an enemy for 2,5 sec.
Once in a while, the unit throws their mace at the enemy with the highest damage. On impact, the target and all enemies in a small radius around it are turned to stone for 3 sec. During that time, they can't move, and they take 35% more damage. Also, the targets of the ability take 300000 physical damage. When petrification wears off, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 30% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
